content.en:
Tempest Chamber of Commerce Headquarters.

After the five Eternal Dao Late-Stage powerhouses learned of the fall of Ulun, they were immediately extremely angry.

"Urun is dead!"

"There is no news from Ulun, how he died, it is not very clear, and there is a high probability that it has something to do with Xinghai. "

"Xinghai, it shouldn't be him, according to the intelligence, he doesn't seem to have left Roselle City!"

"Oh, that's something else?"

"Let's go, go to Xuanlin Valley to check, if it is really done by other forces, you must notify the president. "

"Okay, then let's go and have a look, and stay with some more members of the Eternal Dao Middle Stage. "

Subsequently.

A group of Eternal Daoist powerhouses traveled from the headquarters of the Tempest Chamber of Commerce to Xuanlin Valley to investigate information.

And this is exactly the scene that Luo Xia Pavilion is looking forward to.

......

Xuanlin Valley.

Many of the Eternal Dao powerhouses of the Tempest Chamber of Commerce came, and one by one they made preparations for battle, and probed the surrounding void to prevent the Eternal Dao powerhouses of other forces from ambushing here.

But nothing was seen.

"First break through the Xuanlin Valley formation, the Luoxia Pavilion Eternal Dao powerhouse stationed here must know something. "

Just when they were about to attack the Xuanlin Valley formation, Ye Tian appeared and made a direct move.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian directly used the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to cast the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Divine Power, and the dense silk threads of the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules turned into prisons one after another, binding these Eternal Supreme Dao powerhouses.

They tried to break the shackles, but they couldn't.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian shook his right hand, directly pinched them in his hand, and then sealed them.

"This group of Eternal Daoist powerhouses is too weak!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And at this moment, this group of Eternal Daoists of the Tempest Chamber of Commerce was stunned.

What's the situation, they were sealed by an eternal Daoist powerhouse without any resistance.

Is this really an Eternal Dao powerhouse? Could it be a disguise for the existence of the Eternal Dao Realm?

"Pavilion Master, the Eternal Daoist powerhouse of the Tempest Chamber of Commerce took the initiative to send it to the door, and he has already arrested all of them!"

Ye Tian said.

"Ye Tian, come back temporarily, Roselle City will be safe. If you stay in Xuanlin Valley, I'm afraid that the Wind Lord of the Tempest Chamber of Commerce will personally attack and kill you. "

Luo Wushuang said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded, and immediately took this group of Tempest Chamber of Commerce Eternal Dao powerhouses to Luoshen City.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to arrive in Roselle City.

Subsequently, they imprisoned this group of Tempest Chamber of Commerce's Eternal Daoist powerhouses at the Luoxia Pavilion headquarters and notified the Tempest Chamber of Commerce.

......

Tempest Chamber of Commerce Headquarters.

The Lord of the Wind, who had been in retreat and cultivating, was furious when he got the news that his powerhouses were almost wiped out.

"A bunch of waste, they were caught by Luo Xia Pavilion, who was about to disband!"

The Lord of the Tempest was annoyed.

He couldn't wait to destroy Luoxia Pavilion directly, regardless of that group of waste.

However, he had to tube.

If it doesn't matter, the Tempest Chamber of Commerce will not use the powerhouses of the late stage of Eternal Dao Transformation, and if the news is passed on, who is willing to join the Tempest Chamber of Commerce, and even other powerhouses within the Tempest Chamber of Commerce will choose to leave here.

At that point, the Tempest Chamber of Commerce will have to disintegrate itself.

Thereupon.

The Lord of the Tempest descended on Roselle in person.

When the Lord of the Wind descends on Roselle, the projection of the Lord of Roselle appears.

"Brother Tempest, what are you doing in my Roselle City?"

The Roselle City Lord asked.

"Jin He, I'm not here to make trouble, a group of Eternal Daoist powerhouses from my Tempest Chamber of Commerce have been arrested by Luoxia Pavilion, I'm here to negotiate!"

"What, Luo Xia Pavilion captured the Eternal Dao powerhouse of your Tempest Chamber of Commerce, or did he capture a group of ???"

Jin He, the lord of Roselle City, was extremely surprised.

Could it be the other way around?

But the Wind Lord's menacing appearance is obviously not a fraud.

"Brother Tempest, this is Luoshen City, in short, don't mess around, after all, the order of the Lord of the Augu Kingdom is here, otherwise I will report it directly. Jin He, the lord of Roselle City, said.

"Don't worry!"

The Lord of the Tempest assured.

Immediately.

He went directly into Roselle City and came to Luoxia Pavilion.

......

As soon as he entered Luoxia Pavilion, the Lord of the Wind saw Luo Wushuang, Ye Tian, and Xinghai.

He could see that the sea of punishment had been hit hard.

Moreover, with the strength of Xinghai, don't want to catch a powerhouse in the late stage of Eternal Daohua from the Tempest Chamber of Commerce.

Thereupon.

His gaze was focused on Ye Tian, who seemed to be covered with a veil of mystery, as if he couldn't see it clearly.

"This powerhouse in the late stage of Eternal Daoism is not simple, he should have caught it!

The Lord of the Tempest guessed.

"I've seen the Lord of the Tempest!"

Luo Wushuang and Xinghai said respectfully.

"What about my men, let them go!"

The Lord of the Wind said coldly.

Luo Wushuang said: "Lord of the Wind, let them go, I need the Lord of the Wind to make an oath, from now on, the Wind Chamber of Commerce shall not do anything that threatens our Luoxia Pavilion, nor shall it retaliate." In addition, the items and properties that the Tempest Chamber of Commerce stole from our Luoxia Pavilion need to be sent back. "

"Why do you dare to tell me about the conditions?"

The Lord of the Wind roared.

"Your men are in our hands!"

Luo Wushuang said.

The Lord of the Tempest was eager to do it now, but when he thought about it, there was no need.

Once he kills these Eternal Daoists, he will not be punished to death by the Lord of the Kingdom, but he will definitely be sent there, and it will be easy to fall.

Therefore, he could not give other Eternal Dao Realms a chance to impeach him.

"Okay, I agree!"

The Lord of the Tempest said, "But even if the inheritance is returned to you, you will not be able to keep it. We, the Tempest Chamber of Commerce, don't bother you, and the other forces won't be polite. "

"Then don't worry about the Lord of the Tempest!"

Luo Wushuang sneered.

Immediately.

They began to sign the agreement oath, and after the signing was completed.

Luo Wushuang released the group of Eternal Daoist powerhouses and let them leave.

......

Tempest Chamber of Commerce Headquarters.

After those Eternal Dao powerhouses returned, the Lord of the Tempest asked, "What the hell is going on, you guys were actually caught by Luo Xia Pavilion, what a waste!"

"President, it's Luo Xia Pavilion that has a very demonic Eternal Dao late-stage powerhouse!"

An Eternal Daoist later stage said.

Immediately, he took a screenshot of the original picture and projected it.

When the Lord of the Wind saw this battle scene, his face also changed.

"This strength is too strong, Luo Xia Pavilion will definitely not be able to cultivate it!"

The Lord of the Tempest frowned.

He hadn't seen Ye Tian really attack with all his might, but just the combat power in the picture was not much weaker than an Eternal Dao Realm, even if he couldn't beat him, but it was a little difficult for him to kill the other party.
